productDisplayName: Wildcraft Unisex Gear for Life Red Backpack
description: Black and red backpack, has graphic print patterns and branding in frontPadded and adjustable shoulder straps and a haul loop for carrying easeTwo main zipped compartments, the front compartment has two organiser sleeves, one mesh pocket, and three pen holders insideTwo mesh pockets at the sides with elasticated rimsOne external zipped pocket at the front base which opens to reveal a mesh panel that is held out with hooksPadded back for additional comfortWarranty: 5 year warranty from the date of purchase against manufacturing defects
